summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PIX-only payment flow (iteration 8). Stripe has been fully removed. All payment routes now use manual PIX with admin confirmation. Backend APIs working correctly (100% pass rate on core PIX features). Frontend UI correctly shows only PIX payment buttons with correct comprovante email.
passed_tests: GET /api/pix-info returns pix_key (mateusbpugli@gmail.com)
GET /api/pix-info returns comprovante_email (mateuabuarquepugli@gmail.com)
GET /api/pix-info returns pix_key_type (email)
POST /api/checkout/campaign requires authentication (401)
POST /api/checkout/product requires authentication (401)
POST /api/admin/confirm-pix requires admin role (403)
POST /api/subscribe returns PIX info (pix_key, comprovante_email, amount)
No /api/subscribe/card endpoint exists (404)
No /api/webhook/stripe endpoint exists (404)
GET /api/admin/stats shows pending transactions with awaiting_pix status
GET /api/user/orders returns correct structure
Admin login works with correct credentials
Admin dashboard loads successfully
Admin dashboard shows 'Aguardando Confirmacao de Pagamento' section
Admin dashboard shows 'Confirmar Pagamento' buttons (10 found)
Store page has NO card payment buttons
Subscription page has NO card payment buttons
Subscription page shows 'Assinar via Pix' buttons
PIX modal shows correct comprovante email (mateuabuarquepugli@gmail.com)
PIX modal shows instructions to send comprovante by email
PIX modal shows 'Aguardando confirmacao de pagamento' status
context_for_next_testing_agent: PIX-only payment flow is fully implemented. Stripe has been completely removed. All checkout endpoints (campaign, product, subscription) return PIX info with comprovante_email. Admin can confirm payments via /api/admin/confirm-pix. Frontend shows only PIX buttons, no card options. The comprovante email shown to customers is mateuabuarquepugli@gmail.com (different from admin login email mateusbpugli@gmail.com).
